title: Add `--preproc-resolve` option for preprocessor
body:
This PR adds `--preproc-resolve` option that makes preprocessor to include in its output submodules defined in included files (e.g. by using `-y` flag). This gives user a way of converting a multifile design into a single file without need to listing all files by hand.

I added this behind additional flag, as this requires to also lex and do cell linking of top module to get all used files.
